title: Profitability Waterfall
notes: Legacy createWaterfallChart shows latest-period P&L summary with hardcoded colours #009091 / #F4845F / #013E3F. Approximated here as Accrued Interest → Cost of Funds → Net Interest. 2025 data doesn't carry Net Interest as a stored KPI (only computed on-the-fly in legacy JS); the third bar will show €0 until either a multi-KPI sum query lands or Net Interest is backfilled.
